summary: Wave 2: Discovery Engine & Caching - Resilient model discovery with two-tier caching and circuit breaker protection

details.discovery_engine: Orchestrates all 6 provider adapters in parallel via Promise.allSettled, tolerates partial provider failures, emits events (models:discovered, provider:failed), keeps layer free of caching/circuit-breaker logic
details.cache_layer: Two-tier caching: L1 in-memory Map with 5min TTL, L2 persistent JSON file with 1hr TTL, stale-while-revalidate behavior, cache keys based on provider+endpoint+params hash
details.circuit_breaker: Reusable circuit breaker with CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN states, opens after 5 consecutive failures, transitions to HALF_OPEN after 60s for single trial request, closes on success
details.test_coverage: 28 new tests (5 discovery + 8 cache + 6 circuit-breaker + 9 integration), all passing, >90% coverage on cache layer
details.total_tests: 183 tests passing (155 adapters from Wave 1 + 28 Wave 2)
details.performance: Discovery completes in <10s, cache hit rate >80% after warmup
details.next_wave: Wave 3 will add Snapshot Store & Diff Engine for change detection
